Мастер фраза для определения максимально: Well, that old thing almost tore me to pieces for its gold! gold! gol
dialogs_bridge_Симен? Ох! Слава богу ты: Simen? Oh! Thank goodness you're alive!
dialogs_bridge_Прости Грай, просто начал: Sorry Grey, it's just that the storm began...
dialogs_bridge_Не волнуйся, Симен, мы вы: Don't worry Simen, we'll get you out of there!
dialogs_bridge_Почему вы так долго ехали: Why you took so long?! He almost died!
dialogs_bridge_Милочка, орать не надо. Я:
No need to shout, ma'am. I didn't know that boy was there.
I have more than enough work, came as soon as I could.
dialogs_bridge_Мост разрушен уже черт зн: The bridge's been ruined for God knows how long!
dialogs_bridge_Милочка, это мост в никуд:
Ma'am, this bridge is leading nowhere! 
The kids run over it to kick the crabs! 
I had some more important stuff to do...
dialogs_bridge_Да вы сами не знали, что:
Well you didn't know he was there, too! If you had sent the
request, I would've come the same day!
dialogs_bridge_Сами детей теряют, а мы к: They're loosing their kids and we're to blame!
dialogs_bridge_За что мы только платим н: We're paying our taxes for nothing!
dialogs_bridge_Двое на другом краю берег:
Two of them went on exchanging words on the other side,
leaving you out.
dialogs_bridge_Ну вот и все, малой! Скор: That's it, buddy! You'll be home soon.
dialogs_bridge_Да, только Ханна... Дома:
Yeah, but Hannah... I can hide her at home, but we need to
lead her across the bridge somehow.
dialogs_bridge_Ого! Сейчас у тебя горазд:
Wow! This time you were so much better at pretending
to be "just a sheep"!
dialogs_bridge_Эм, ну... Сейчас я не при: Er, well... I'm not pretending now, so it did the trick.
dialogs_bridge_Как бы сказать... Теперь:
How do I say that... Now I know who I am, and I can be
different. It's not the same as pretending.
dialogs_bridge_Да, только на той стороне:
Yes, but you want to stay quite on the other side, or it can 
turn us over.
dialogs_bridge_Уважаемый, а сколько буде: Excuse me sir, how much longer the bridge will be on repair?
dialogs_bridge_Я разбился на корабле. Ме: My ship crashed. I was washed ashore.
dialogs_bridge_Слушай, ты то хоть под ру: Listen, don't be a jinx. We'll do it how we'll do it.
dialogs_bridge_Привет, мальчик! У тебя о: Hello, boy! That's a cute sheep you have.
dialogs_bridge_Мы напишем на этого дядю: We'll write this sir up and make him answer for his blunder!
dialogs_bridge_Наверное, переживала за б: She's just worried about her brother.
dialogs_bridge_А тебя как угораздило сюд:
What brought you here? It's pretty far from the closest
fishermen bay.
dialogs_bridge_Я не с этого острова. При: I'm not from the island. Came on board of Mary Rose...
dialogs_bridge_Не с острова? Это как?: Not from the island? How so?
dialogs_bridge_Я пересек туман и оказалс: I came through the mist and ended up here.
dialogs_bridge_Я с большой земли. Мы нат:
I'm from the continent. We stumbled into you by accident. 
Entered the fog and... I might be the sole survivor.
dialogs_bridge_\"С большой земли\", гово: "From the continent", you say... I get that.
dialogs_bridge_Я понимаю, это может звуч: I know, it might sound shocking...
dialogs_bridge_Конечно. Я сообщу о тебе:
Of course. I'll let the local administration know about you. 
I'm sure they know what to do in this case.
dialogs_bridge_Надо будет зайти в эту ад:
I should come and see this administration. 
I bet they'll be happy to know their "cursed fog" is fading away.
dialogs_bridge_А ведь я смогу возглавить: And I could lead the expedition...
dialogs_bridge_Точно! Я единственный нас: Right! I'm the only real sailor on the island!
dialogs_bridge_Пару пробных заходов в ту:
A few rounds into the fog, and then we'll be able to build a real
ship... Captain Eirik, how does that sound?
dialogs_bridge_Ух ты, а ведь дело может:
Oh wow, this might actually work! I should totally go there to
see this administration!
